description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind DPC++ CI that runs on push and pull request events to the development branch, specifically for changes to cmake, amr-wind, submods, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, and the workflow file itself. Configure an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository with submodules, prepare a DPC++ environment by installing necessary packages, and then configure and build the project using cmake with DPC++ and clang compilers.
